title: pyrus cordata subsp. boissieriana
intro: Pyrus cordata subsp. boissieriana, also known as the Korean mountain pear, is a subspecies of pear tree native to Korea. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus cordata subsp. boissieriana include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional Korean medicine.
